t1.title: The platform won't open or keeps freezing
t1.body:
If the platform won't open or keeps freezing, try the following steps:

1. Clear your browser cache (Ctrl+Shift+Delete)
2. Make sure your internet speed is at least 1Mbps
3. Try a different browser (Chrome/Edge/Firefox)
4. Turn off your VPN if you're using one
5. Make sure your browser is updated to the latest version

If the problem persists, open a support ticket with a screenshot.

t2.title: Images won't upload or display
t2.body:
If images won't upload:

1. Check your internet connection
2. Clear your browser cache
3. Make sure the image is in JPG/PNG/WEBP format
4. Make sure the image size doesn't exceed 10MB
5. Try refreshing the page (F5)

If images still won't upload, check your browser's camera/file access permissions.

t3.title: Notification issues
t3.body:
To enable notifications:

1. Allow the site to send notifications when prompted
2. Make sure your device isn't in "Silent" or "Do Not Disturb" mode
3. Open your browser settings → Notifications → Allow Harth

To receive email notifications, make sure your email is correct in your account settings.

f1.title: How do I pay? Available payment methods
f1.body:
Available payment methods on the Harth platform:

✅ Credit card (Visa / Mastercard)
✅ Cash on delivery (COD) — available in some areas

When paying by card:
- Enter your card details on the secure page
- Your bank may ask for an OTP code
- The amount is charged immediately when the order is confirmed

f2.title: Payment failed
f2.body:
If your payment fails:

1. Make sure your card details are correct (number, expiry, CVV)
2. Make sure you have sufficient balance
3. Make sure your card is enabled for online payments
4. Contact your bank to lift restrictions on online payments
5. Try a different card

If the amount was deducted but the order wasn't completed, it will be refunded automatically within 3–5 business days.

f3.title: Refunds — when will it arrive?
f3.body:
Refund policy:

• Cancelling more than 24 hours before delivery: full refund
• Cancelling within 24 hours: a cancellation fee may apply
• Refund time: 3–7 business days for credit cards

If 7 days have passed and the refund hasn't arrived, contact us via a support ticket.

a1.title: How do I reset my password?
a1.body:
To reset your password:

1. Click "Forgot password" on the login page
2. Enter your registered email address
3. Open the reset email in your inbox (check your spam folder too)
4. Click the link and enter a new password

The link is valid for 24 hours only.

a2.title: How do I change my account information?
a2.body:
To edit your account details:

1. Click your name in the top corner
2. Select "Account Settings"
3. Edit your name, phone number, or profile photo
4. Save the changes

Note: changing your email requires additional verification.

a3.title: How do I become an equipment owner?
a3.body:
To start selling or renting out as an equipment owner:

1. Register a new account or log into your existing one
2. Choose the "Owner" role when registering, or from account settings
3. Complete identity verification (KYC)
4. Go to the "Owner Dashboard" page
5. Click "Add Equipment" and enter your equipment details

o1.title: How do I rent equipment?
o1.body:
To rent equipment on the Harth platform:

1. Browse equipment on the "Equipment" page
2. Choose the equipment you need and click "Book"
3. Select the start and end dates
4. Review the price and complete the payment
5. You'll receive a confirmation message as soon as the booking is complete
6. The owner will contact you to arrange delivery

o2.title: How do I track my order?
o2.body:
To track your order:

1. Go to the "My Orders" page from the menu
2. Find your order or select it from the list
3. Click "Track Order" to see the courier's current location
4. You can call the courier directly from the tracking page

If your order is delayed beyond the expected time, please open a support ticket.

o3.title: How do I cancel an order?
o3.body:
To cancel an order:

1. Go to the "My Orders" page
2. Select the order you want to cancel
3. Click "Cancel Order" (only available for orders with "New" or "Confirmed" status)
4. Select a cancellation reason

After cancellation, the amount is refunded according to the refund policy.

l1.title: How do loyalty points work?
l1.body:
The Harth loyalty program:

🌟 Earn points with every completed order
💎 100 points = 1 OMR discount on your next orders
🏆 The more points you earn, the higher your tier (Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum)

To view your balance: go to the "Loyalty Program" page from the menu.

check.title: Crop Diagnosis Guide - Harth
check.pageSubheading: Learn about common pests and how to treat them effectively and safely

palmWeevil.name: Red Palm Weevil
palmWeevil.desc: One of the most dangerous pests affecting date palm trees — the larvae feed on living tissue inside the trunk, which can kill the tree.
palmWeevil.treatment: Direct injection of systemic pesticides into the trunk, along with removing and burning infected parts immediately to prevent spread.

fruitFly.name: Fruit Fly
fruitFly.desc: The fruit fly is one of the most dangerous pests affecting ripe fruit, causing severe crop losses. The female lays her eggs inside the fruit, causing infected fruit to rot and fall, resulting in total crop loss.
fruitFly.treatment: Spot-spraying with poison baits or using pheromone traps, along with collecting and disposing of infected and fallen fruit immediately to prevent the pest from spreading.

aphids.name: Aphids
aphids.desc: Small insects that cluster on new leaves and buds, sucking sap and causing leaf curling and the appearance of black mold.
aphids.treatment: A natural soap solution or neem oil can be used; in severe infestations, specialized insecticides are recommended.
